name: Rachadoc
description: Patient Management System designed to help clinics and hospitals easily manage patient information and appointment scheduling.

name: N-Puzzle
description: N Puzzle is a sliding blocks game that takes place on a k * k grid with ((k * k) - 1) tiles each numbered from 1 to N.this project aims to solve n-puzzle game with A* and similar algorithms.

name: Corewar
description: Core War is a 1984 programming game created by D. G. Jones and A. K. Dewdney in which two or more battle programs compete for control of a virtual computer. These battle programs are written in an abstract assembly language called Redcode.

name: Fractol
description: Fractol is a project aimed at exploring fractals, mathematical sets that exhibit a repeating pattern displayed at every scale.
